name: run_pipeline
description: Trigger a pipeline run in Azure DevOps. Optionally specify a source branch, runtime variables, and template parameters. Returns the run ID, state, and a URL to view the run in the browser. The pipeline will execute asynchronously.

parameters.name: organization
parameters.description: The name of the Azure DevOps organization.

parameters.name: project
parameters.description: The name or ID of the project.

parameters.name: pipelineId
parameters.description: The ID of the pipeline to run.

parameters.name: api-version
parameters.description: Version of the API to use. Use '7.1'.

parameters.name: resources
parameters.description: Resources for the run, including repositories with refName to specify the branch (e.g., 'refs/heads/feature-branch').

parameters.name: variables
parameters.description: Runtime variables as key-value pairs. Each value is an object with 'value' and optional 'isSecret' properties.

parameters.name: templateParameters
parameters.description: Template parameters as key-value pairs passed to the pipeline YAML template.
